reviews.review_description: This game installs itself every time after it is uninstalled and power off Quest 3s. Fix it please(
Models are not bad. A few are very good (the ones with 3D fur). Animations are basic and not physically realistic. UI and "gameplay" are okay. Worth a try if you aren't expecting much.

Stinky poop butt.                                                                                      .         .          .      Keep scrolling.                   A little bit more
